name: Rima Touya
description: __Height__: 166 cm One of the youngest night class students. She works as a model alongside Senri Shiki. Her exact relationship with Senri Shiki is unknown, though they are almost always seen together, signifying a close relationship. (Source: Wikipedia) Rima was the shortest night class student until ~!Yuki Kuran became her vampire form. Rima is only a cm taller than the Kuran Princess!~

description: Rinko's student and something more

name: Sagwan
description: A resident of the Hidden Condo.

name: Satone Kaidou
description: One of Group C's opponents who debuts in the All-Bet round of the Adult Tomodachi Game and the daughter of Tsukasa Kaidou. An excellent gambler, she tends to rely on her gut feeling and exceedingly sharp senses when it comes to bets, making her pretty much unpredictable and earning her a reputation as "a true monster". Back when she was a child, she had a strong desire to stick out from the crowd, for example going to school barefoot so that other people would consider her weird and avoid her. H

name: Sera Kang
description: She is a member of the Mil-Yang Clan and is currently the clan's head. She had initially gained a grudge against Shi-Woon Yi because Goomoonryong had killed her grandfather until today, where the two are friends-in-arms, and love interest of Shi-Woon Yi She is a young, slender girl with ears that stick out of her long, black, straight hair. She is often wearing formal attire. Other clothing she had worn would be general clothing, whether it'd be a long or short-sleaved shirt with shorts or skirt

name: Sheila Tuel Meta-llicana
nativeName: シーラ・トェル・メタ=リカーナ
description: The beautiful princess of Meta-llicana Kingdom, known for her long black hair. She is proud of her royal upbringing and has a strong sense of responsibility but is quite naïve. She is subject to the mercy of Dark Schneider’s whims but eventually falls for him.
mediaTitles: BASTARD!! -Heavy Metal, Dark Fantasy- Hell’s Requiem Arc

BASTARD!! -Heavy Metal, Dark Fantasy- Hell’s Requiem Arc

name: Shinobu Takatsuki
description: Shinobu is the eighteen year-old son of the dean of M University, thus Miyagi You's ex brother-in-law. He is talented and rich, which allowed him to go study abroad in Australia. Shinobu believes in fate and in love. For someone that has everything he wants in his life, the fact he finds one thing that he cannot have sparks his interest: Miyagi You. After hearing that his sister divorced, Shinobu rushes back to Japan to meet with Miyagi in order to reveal his feelings for him, and ask him in all

name: Shion Kujou
description: Shion Kujo is the rich and spoiled girl of the group. Being raised in a rich environment, she frequently whines which results in her sometimes embarrassing herself. Initially distrustful at Homare Onishima at first, she gradually warms up to the group while adjusting to her current stranded life.

name: Sou Izuhara
description: Sou is a very kind person who is friendly to everyone, although sometimes he can be awkward or short-tempered. In high school, Sou was a loner who was bullied and never defended himself, until one day someone stood up for him and gave him some words of wisdom. Inspired by that person, Sou decided to make some changes with his life. He started muscle training, changed his appearance, and made many friends. He later formed VOICE, a crime prevention group that protects east Karasugaoka. He often he

name: Tae-Jun Kan
description: Kan Tae-Jun is the second son of the Fire Tribe General Kan Soo-Jin. He is in love with Yona and has been determined to make her his wife so he could inherit the throne of the Kouka Kingdom. Tae-Jun is a happy, cowardly, and arrogant man who is obsessed with Yona. He is a pampered person that gets anything he wants and will grow resentful and childish if someone stops him for claiming it. At times, he can also be sneaky and will go against even his father's orders if he thinks it'll be for the b

name: Takuto Tsunashi
description: The protagonist of the series, Takuto Tsunashi is a 15-year old boy who left the mainland to go to the Southern Cross Island in pursuit of a "fabulous school life". With a bright and positive personality, he easily makes friends with all the people in the school. Unbeknownst to all, he is the "Galactic Pretty Boy", a person that has the ability to control a Cybody directly and unleash its true power. He uses his gift to fight the Glittering Crux Brigade in order to stop their plans to release th

name: Tomoya Sugisaki
description: Third-year high schooler who is refraining from taking his exams. Tomoya normally does everything well, as he has excellent grades, but is frustrated by parents who only allows his studies. He really likes painting more than anything else. Tomoya acts a little cold to others, but for "some reason", he invites Aoi and Ryou to "find a summer ghost".

name: Tsuchiya
description: Hijiri Koganei's chauffeur who cares for him deeply. He offers romantic advice to Hijiri, and at times appears as a joke romance candidate, considered equally handsome to the candidates. He can appear by Hijiri's side at the click of a finger, and gets emotional when Hijiri expresses gratitude to him. He genuinely appreciates Anzu's presence in Hijiri's life, and considers her to be a very good influence on him. Unfortunately, because of the amount of girls who have flung themselves in front of

name: Tsunoda
description: Tsunoda has a very upbeat and perky personality that tends to drive her co-workers crazy. She forever follows Ton around, praising him for his golfing skills. Retsuko brings this up to Tsunoda during dinner to which Tsunoda responds that she does this for a reason: to stay on the management's good side and that she is fully aware that her co-workers think less of her for it. Tsunoda has an active social media and dating life and tries to drag Retsuko and Fenneko into it.

name: Tsuzuru Minagi
description: He's the third member of the Spring Troupe. To fulfill his dream of becoming a scenarist, he joins not only as an actor but as a writer for all scripts as well. Tsuzuru decides to relieve the financial burden his big family endures a bit by living in the Mankai Companys dormitory. Aside from attending a university, Tsuzuru is also constantly working between multiple part time jobs. (Source: A3 wikia)

name: Umigame
description: Muten-Rôshi's friend and long-time companion, the good-natured lovable turtle lives in the Kame House with the elderly hermit. During Dragon Ball Z in the anime filler, he celebrates his 1,000th birthday in episode 117. He plays a relatively small part in the manga, but he has quite a few large roles in the anime. When he first appeared, he was in the wilderness, alone and lost. He was picking mushrooms when he got separated from his friends and had since been wandering around on land for over a

name: Vanilla Mieux
description: Vanilla is very shy, timid and cute. She cries a lot (which attracts boys) and is very kind and gentle. She is the opposite of Chocolat and has a very soft voice. Vanilla is also more conscientious. She doesn't get angry a lot (rarely) and her familiar is Blanca, the mouse (who gives good advice on how to win hearts, unlike Duke) and Vanilla is very babyish. She loves cute stuff and she is a good cook. She is smart as well. Vanilla is a very sweet girl and she is the daughter of Queen Candy. She

name: Xinyan
description: A rock 'n' roll musician in Liyue. Xinyan has a Pyro vision and wields a claymore.

name: Yuito Sumeragi
description: __Suppression Force Division:__ 567th Class __ID:__ WSY567369 __Height:__ 173 cm __Power:__ Psychokinesis __Weapon:__ Katana A bright and optimistic boy who is both strong willed and kind. He is the second son of the Sumeragi family, descended from the founding father of New Himuka. He comes from a long line of politicians with his father, Joe Sumeragi, being the current head of government, and his older brother Kaito directing the Other Suppression Force as Chief.
